calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code 12200 Et Seq.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before This Date
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (51 Ellsworth St, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna K. Mannion for SF Public Administrator, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Andrew De Vries, Petitioner's Agent (via Zoom).
Robert F. Dougherty, buyer.
Ebrahim Pakzad, buyer's agent.
Bich Loc, overbidder.
Peter Tham, overbidder's agent.

The matter was heard on the petition for confirmation of sale of real property located at 51 Ellsworth Street, San Francisco, CA. The property was originally contracted to sell for $800,000. Overbidding was conducted in open court pursuant to the terms and conditions set forth in the Report of Sale filed on May 13, 2025.

Overbidding proceeded in $5,000 increments, beginning at $840,500. After multiple rounds of bidding, the highest bid was submitted in the amount of $905,000 by Bich Loc, an overbidder. The original buyer declined to bid further.

The sale was confirmed at $905,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No bond is required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Brianna Mannnion, Esq., for the San Francisco Public Guardian (SFPG), Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel confirms that an amended Notice of Hearing has been filed which included the procedure for how to make a remote appearance. The court acknowledges the preceding. The court then confirms with counsel that they intend to file an heirship petition once the list of potential heirs has been finalized.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is granted. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed Administrator with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing is set for Feb-02-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Personal Representative shall file either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq. two weeks before this date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
